summary.intent: Fix a crash in the Cursor CLI unified evaluation mode caused by two bugs: debug file writes (ENOENT) killing evaluators, and aggregation loops crashing with TypeError when the concurrency limiter stored raw Error objects instead of proper results.
summary.outcome: All four debug write locations were wrapped in try/catch, two aggregation loops were guarded against malformed results, and a commit was successfully created. All 1346 project tests pass, lint and typecheck are clean.

repo: The project has two evaluation modes (independent and unified), each with separate debug write code paths for prompt and response — changes must be applied to both modes.
`runWithConcurrencyLimit` stores raw Error objects in its results array when callbacks throw outside the inner try/catch, so consumers must defensively check result shape before accessing properties.
The pre-commit hook runs `bun test src/` which recursively picks up ALL test files under src/ including any files inside `tmp/clones/` from stale evaluation runs.
`tmp/clones/` is populated by evaluation runs and can persist stale test suites that pollute the test runner and block commits.

code.finding: Independent mode prompt debug write — needs try/catch to prevent IO failure from crashing evaluator.
Independent mode response debug write — same try/catch fix required.
Unified mode prompt debug write — wrapped in try/catch.
Unified mode response debug write — wrapped in try/catch.
Per-file issues aggregation loop: guard `if (!evalResult?.perFileIssues) continue` added to skip raw Error objects from concurrency limiter.
Cross-file issues aggregation loop: same defensive guard added.

workflow: When `bun run test` output is noisy, scope to `bun test src/` to isolate project tests from cloned repos, then grep for project-prefixed paths to confirm pass/fail count.
The Edit tool can struggle with tab-indented files due to rendering differences; reading surrounding context before editing helps confirm exact whitespace.

friction: Edit tool initially failed due to tab vs. space indentation ambiguity in the Read tool output, requiring a second read to confirm exact file content before edits succeeded.
Pre-commit hook blocked the commit because `bun test src/` picked up 114 failing tests from a stale `tmp/clones/agents-eval-eqYk1k/` directory unrelated to the changes.
Had to interrupt the commit workflow to ask user permission to remove the stale clone directory before the commit could proceed.
open_items: `tmp/clones/` is not automatically cleaned up after evaluation runs, creating a recurring risk of stale test files blocking commits — consider adding a cleanup step or gitignore pattern.
Pre-existing modified/untracked files were present in the repo at commit time but left unaddressed as out of scope for this fix.
